backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat backend with user registration, conversation management (one-on-one and group), message sending/retrieval, and blob storage for media files. Includes access control, principal-to-user mapping, and helper functions for participant verification and conversation views.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two features—fixing the registration flow in RegistrationScreen.tsx and fixing post-registration navigation in App.tsx—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes across components, hooks, styles, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for the app's design system, including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Xeta' and mounts the React app via a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, profile loading with timeout/retry logic, screen navigation (chat-list, chat, contacts, group, profile), and a `justRegistered` flag to prevent looping back to registration after a successful createUser call.
frontend/src/components/BluetoothPairing: Empty file with no content provided.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Empty file with no content provided.
frontend/src/components/ChatListScreen.t: Chat list screen component that displays sorted conversations with last message previews and timestamps, and provides navigation buttons for new chats, groups, and the user profile.
frontend/src/components/ChatScreen.tsx: Main chat screen component that displays messages for a conversation, handles sending text/file/image messages, auto-scrolls to the latest message, and marks received messages as delivered.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionStatus: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ContactsList.tsx: Contacts list screen that allows users to search for other users by username/ID and initiate a new chat by selecting a found contact.
frontend/src/components/CreateGroupScree: Two-step screen for creating a group chat: first search and select participants, then enter a group name before submitting the group creation.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders a single chat message bubble supporting text, image, and file message types, with timestamp and delivery receipt icon aligned by sender.
frontend/src/components/PresenceIndicato: Displays a user's online/offline presence status with an optional colored dot and formatted last-seen text.
frontend/src/components/ProfileScreen.ts: Profile editing screen that lets the current user update their display name and status message, view their avatar, and log out.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptIcon.tsx: Renders an SVG message receipt icon (single check, double check, or blue double check) based on the message's sent/delivered/read status.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationScre: React form component for new user registration that collects a username and display name, validates input, calls the createUser mutation, and navigates to the chat list on success.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Displays a user avatar as either an image (if avatarUrl is provided) or a colored initials circle with a deterministic hue based on the display name, supporting four size variants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile CRUD, contact management, conversations, and messaging mutations against the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the Xeta dark green/charcoal design-token CSS variables for both light and dark themes along with custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/types/web-bluetooth.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely a placeholder for Web Bluetooth API type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting timestamps into relative time strings, presence status, message times, and chat-list times, plus a helper to extract initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Xeta app, defining custom colors (including xeta-branded greens and dark panels), fonts, border radii, shadows, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracker for the Xeta messaging app (version 19), documenting existing features, known issues (sign-in loading and registration failures), architectural notes, and the transition from Bluetooth-based to internet-based real-time messaging.
